body:
## Summary
- Pin JuliaFormatter to an exact version (`2.10.1`) in the formatter GitHub Action, `test/Project.toml`, and the README so formatting is reproducible across CI and local runs.
- Reformat the codebase with JuliaFormatter v2.10.1 (whitespace/style only, no logic changes).

See [Pinning the JuliaFormatter version](https://juliaeditorsupport.github.io/JuliaFormatter.jl/stable/status/#Pinning-the-JuliaFormatter-version) for why pinning is recommended.

## Test plan
- [x] `git diff` reviewed — formatting-only changes
- [ ] CI passes
title: Pin JuliaFormatter to v2.10.1

body:
On `main`, the current implementation of `read!` is calling `read` and using the array to fill out `dest`. For example, it looks like this:

```julia
dest .= FileReaders.read(file_reader, date)
```

This is not a good pattern because the right hand side still allocates a temporary array. This PR changes this by implementing `read` by allocating the destination array and calling `read!` with it.
title: Remove unnecessary allocations in read and read!
